shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' /home/user/.codex/plugins/cache/nowledge-community/nowledge-mem/0.1.28/skills/search-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- memory search ---\\n' && nmem --json m search \"Downshift useSelect type-ahead space character highlighted query\" --space default --limit 5 || true && printf '\\n--- repo files ---\\n' && pwd && rg -n \"type.?ahead|search.*(query|input)|character\" . --glob '"'!node_modules'"' --glob '"'!dist'"' | head -160"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '340,530p' src/hooks/useSelect/__tests__/getToggleButtonProps.test.js && sed -n '1,180p' src/hooks/useSelect/testUtils.js && rg -n \"keysSoFar|isPrintable|key === ' '|Space|character\" src/hooks/useSelect src/hooks | head -200"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,150p' src/hooks/useSelect/utils.ts && sed -n '70,285p' src/hooks/useSelect/index.js && sed -n '1,125p' src/hooks/useSelect/reducer.js && sed -n '530,700p' src/hooks/useSelect/__tests__/getToggleButtonProps.test.js"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,90p' src/hooks/useSelect/index.js && sed -n '285,390p' src/hooks/useSelect/index.js && sed -n '1,150p' src/hooks/useSelect/reducer.js && sed -n '780,830p' src/hooks/useSelect/README.md && rg -n \"ToggleButtonKeyDownCharacter|key.length|event.key\" src/hooks/useSelect/index.js src/hooks/useSelect/__tests__"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"function isAcceptedCharacterKey|isAcceptedCharacterKey\" src/hooks && sed -n '1,100p' src/hooks/utils.js 2>/dev/null || true && sed -n '1,100p' src/hooks/utils.ts 2>/dev/null || true && git status --short && cat package.json | sed -n '1,80p'"
/bin/bash -lc "git remote -v && git branch -a --contains HEAD | head -30 && git log --all --oneline --grep='space.*search\\|typeahead\\|character' -i | head -30"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,90p' src/hooks/useSelect/testUtils.js && sed -n '180,220p' src/hooks/useSelect/testUtils.js && sed -n '1,90p' src/hooks/useSelect/__tests__/utils.test.ts && git status --short"
/bin/bash -lc 'npx kcd-scripts test --no-watch src/hooks/useSelect && git diff --check && git diff -- src/hooks/useSelect/index.js src/hooks/useSelect/utils.ts'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' /home/user/.codex/plugins/cache/nowledge-community/nowledge-mem/0.1.28/skills/distill-memory/SKILL.md && nmem --json m search \"useSelect Space active type-ahead query highlighted index inclusive\" --space default --limit 5 || true"

/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m add "Downshift useSelect type-ahead behavior: a Space key extends the active inputValue query (so labels containing spaces can match), but standalone Space retains toggle/select semantics. Character matching skips the current highlight only for a one-character query; for longer queries it includes the current highlighted item, and starts at index 0 when no valid highlight exists." -t "useSelect type-ahead Space and multi-character matching" --unit-type decision -l "downshift" -l "typeahead" -s codex -i 0.8'
